selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel topology-language reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the topology-contract parent into controller-facing fences for law-thin compatibility, local weak adjacency and neighborhood handling, certified non-inflating path handling, blocked automatic relation-family generation and global completeness, and anti-identity / anti-geometry / anti-semantic-completion closure.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel follow-on after the topology packet is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the topology-language boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: COMPATIBILITY_STAYS_EXPLICIT_SCOPED_AND_NON_EQUIVALENCE_BEARING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's law-thin compatibility fence without allowing equivalence inflation.

candidate_items.name: ADJACENCY_AND_NEIGHBORHOODS_STAY_LOCAL_EXPLICIT_ATEMPORAL_AND_NON_METRIC
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps local topology-like structure from widening into metric, temporal, or closure-law doctrine.

candidate_items.name: RELATION_VALID_PATHS_REQUIRE_EXPLICIT_CERTIFICATION_AND_CANNOT_COLLAPSE_INTO_PATH_EQUIVALENCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's admitted path lane into a controller fence against endpoint and concatenation inflation.

candidate_items.name: RELATION_FAMILIES_DO_NOT_GENERATE_EACH_OTHER_AND_GLOBAL_COMPLETENESS_STAYS_BLOCKED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's anti-auto-generation and anti-global-completeness posture across compatibility, adjacency, and neighborhoods.

candidate_items.name: TOPOLOGY_LANGUAGE_CANNOT_YIELD_IDENTITY_SCALARIZATION_GEOMETRY_OR_CANONICAL_MEANING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's anti-identity, anti-geometry, and anti-semantic-completion close into a usable controller fence.

quarantined_items.name: TOPOLOGY_LANGUAGE_AS_EQUIVALENCE_REACHABILITY_OR_IDENTITY_MACHINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent allows topology vocabulary while denying equivalence, connectedness, reachability, and identity escalation, so that overread must stay quarantined.

quarantined_items.name: TOPOLOGY_LANGUAGE_AS_METRIC_GEOMETRIC_ANALYTIC_OR_SEMANTIC_COMPLETION_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it keeps topology vocabulary available while blocking metric, geometric, analytic, and semantic-completion drift.

notes: This batch was produced as the twenty-eighth controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
